titleStmt.title: SII 16.283: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 283. (A.R. No. 823 of 1917.) VAḌIGEPALLI, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a boulder near the Āñjanēyasvāmin temple.

This is dated Śaka 1494, Śrīmukha, Āshāḍha śu. 11. The Śaka year quoted seems to be wrong for 1495. Āshāḍha was an intercalary month in Śrīmukha and the details probably correspond to 1573 A.D., July 10, (Friday) if the month quoted is taken as Nija-Āshāḍha.
It registers the grant of the village Vaḍigepalya as sarvamānya to Tirumala Komāra Tātāchrāya of Penugoṇḍa by the king for the merit of his mother Veṅggaḷāji-amma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīvijayābhyudaya
śubhamastu śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1494 Agunēṭi tadu
parivartamāna śrīmukha saṁvatsara Āṣāḍha śu 11 lu śrīraṁgadēva ma
hārāyalugāru tama talli veṁggaḷājiĀṁmmavāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu
penugoṁḍa tirumala komāra tātācā(ṁ)ryula Āyavāriki vaḍige
palyagrāmaṁ sarvamānyaAgrahāraṁgānu dhārabōsi yicina dha
rmaśāsanaṁ yi dharmānaku yavaru tapinānu tama talitaṁḍrula vāra
ṇāsilōna vadhiyiṁcina pāpāna pōduru yiṣani yicina dharmaśāsanaṁ
śrīśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.283 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
